title: App Settings - General - Licenses no wifi  [New]
scenario: Verify license links and source links function correctly when the app is opened without WiFi
steps: Turn off WiFi and start the app.
Tap each license link (MIT, Apache 2.0, etc.) — expected: each opens with headline, description, and a Cancel (X) button visible in the upper right.
Tap the Source link for each license — expected: currently shows "Something is wrong" screen.
expected: Each license link opens with headline, description, and a Cancel (X) button visible in the upper right. Tapping the Source link for each license shows a "Something is wrong" screen.
